channel.title: waapply
channel.description: Artificial Intelligence news updates from waapply.

item.title: Elon Musk Says 'If AI/Robots Increase Output, Then You Must Issue Dollars To People or There Will Be Mass
item.description: Elon Musk has argued that federally funded checks delivering a universal high income are his preferred response to job losses tied to artificial intelligence,?

item.title: Anthropic Debuts Claude Design for Creating Prototypes, Pitch Decks, and Mockups
item.description: Anthropic today launched Claude Design, a new AI product for creating designs, prototypes, slides, and more. Claude Design uses Opus 4.7, a new AI model that?

item.title: OpenAI Executive Kevin Weil Is Leaving the Company
item.description: The former Instagram VP is departing the ChatGPT-maker, which is also sunsetting the ?OpenAI for Science? application he led. Kevin Weil, OpenAIs former chief?

item.title: Reese Witherspoon Doubles Down on AI Comments After Fan Backlash
item.description: Reese Witherspoon asked 10 women at her book club a simple question about artificial intelligence. The answers ? and what she did next ? ignited a fierce?

item.title: OpenAI Has a New AI Model Built for Biology and Science
item.description: GPT-Rosalind is intended to help scientists streamline their research and drug discovery. OpenAI's latest AI model is built to do far more than offer cooking?

item.title: A transformative moment': Research shows AI could become the "King of Babel" as LLMs master rare, obscure languages
item.description: AI models are rapidly improving in rare languages through shared learning patterns, though real-world fluency still lags behind benchmark performance.?

item.title: Streamlining admin controls for Gemini Enterprise in the Google Workspace Admin console
item.description: Managing generative AI tools that can access your Google Workspace data will be easier than before with dedicated controls to manage Gemini Enterprise access?

item.title: Perspective: AI demand is inflated, and only Anthropic is being realistic
item.description: The main usage metric for artificial intelligence, called tokens, looks explosive on paper, but it may be significantly overstated. The main demand signal for?

item.title: Monzo founder makes dark prediction about your job in AI future
item.description: The future job market doesn't look very bright, according to Tom Blomfield, who believes that artificial intelligence will make a host of roles redundant. The?
